summary: Completed comprehensive testing of file upload and voice input features. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All 10 frontend UI tests passed (100%). File upload, download, and message with attachments working correctly.

issues:
Minor React hydration warning:
and 
 cannot be descendants of 
 in markdown rendering - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warning in ChatArea.jsx markdown rendering - code blocks inside paragraphs cause HTML nesting issues. Consider wrapping code blocks differently in MarkdownContent component.
seed_data_creation: Test files created during testing (text files and images) - stored in Emergent object storage
context_for_next_testing_agent: File upload feature fully working. Backend APIs for file upload/download tested. Frontend file picker, attachment preview, and message with attachments all working. Voice input (mic button) toggles state but Speech API may not work in headless browser.

backend_tests.1_upload_text_file: PASSED - POST /api/files/upload with text file returns metadata with is_image=false
backend_tests.2_upload_image_file: PASSED - POST /api/files/upload with image file returns metadata with is_image=true
backend_tests.4_download_with_bearer_token: PASSED - GET /api/files/{file_id} with Bearer token returns file content
backend_tests.7_message_with_file_ids: PASSED - POST /api/chats/{chat_id}/messages with file_ids returns response with attachments
backend_tests.8_message_with_image: PASSED - Image files processed as vision input
backend_tests.10_various_file_types: PASSED - JSON, MD, PY, CSV files all upload correctly

frontend_tests.2_hidden_file_input: PASSED - Hidden input found with data-testid='file-input'
frontend_tests.3_mic_button: PASSED - Mic button found with data-testid='mic-button', visible and clickable
frontend_tests.4_send_button: PASSED - Send button found with data-testid='send-button'
frontend_tests.5_chat_input: PASSED - Chat input found with data-testid='chat-message-input'
frontend_tests.6_file_attachment_preview: PASSED - File preview appears after upload with data-testid='attached-file-{id}'
frontend_tests.7_send_with_attachment: PASSED - Message sent with attachment, appears in chat
frontend_tests.8_attachment_in_chat: PASSED - Attachment display found with data-testid='msg-attachment-{id}'
frontend_tests.9_image_upload: PASSED - Image file uploads and shows thumbnail preview
frontend_tests.10_mic_button_toggle: PASSED - Mic button toggles state (red when listening)

message_with_files.text_extraction: Working - Text files content extracted and sent to LLM
message_with_files.vision_input: Working - Images sent as base64 data URLs to multimodal models
message_with_files.attachments_display: Working - Attachments shown in user message bubble

voice_input.state_toggle: Working - Button changes color when listening
voice_input.speech_api: Browser Web Speech API - may not work in headless browser
